title: Perfect
why_this_song: Repeated adjective 'perfect' in a simple declarative pattern. Vocabulary is everyday and emotional — ideal for A1 students practicing simple statements.

vocab_hooks.note: long adjective; teach stress pattern BEAU-ti-ful

grammar_callouts: I found X / I have found X — simple vs present perfect

lines: Baby, I'm dancing in the dark
When I saw you in that dress, looking so beautiful

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "perfect" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "perfect" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "found" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "found" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I found a love, for me
When you said you looked a mess

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Well, I found a girl, beautiful and sweet
I know we'll be alright this time

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Perfect" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Perfect", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Perfect" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Perfect" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Perfect", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Perfect", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** Short words, slow pace, repetitive chorus — a safe first-time listening exercise. Vocabulary crosses into A2 when discussing the verse narrative.
